steps.name: app_factory_command_center
steps.output_tail:
aywalls + multiple fine-tuned LLMs. Monetization: freemium, $4.99/wk anchor, $12.99/mo, $59.99/yr, $99.99 lifetime. Soft paywall with hidden skip button + 7-day trial. Growth: character persona TikTok accounts (Sarah from Bible Chat), 500+ videos, 1 video at 60M views, then scaled winners as paid ads on TikTok/Meta/Google. Multi-language localized ads. SEO content funnel. Books & Reference category (less competition than Lifestyle). 97% free users, ~1-2% conversion rate. App Store ID 6448849666. | ITERATE_EXISTING_NOW | score=179 | target=PrayerLock / Scripture Streak AI layer
   2. Pomodoro iOS app. Solo dev. $0 ad spend. 23 days to $300 MRR. 2.8K downloads. 4 tactics: (1) 20+ language localization Day 1 for non-US App Store long-tail ranking. (2) Native SwiftUI as marketing angle. (3) Human narrative story for Reddit posts not product pitch. (4) Lifetime pricing at ~1yr sub price to drive cash and anchor value. | ITERATE_EXISTING_NOW | score=133 | target=Vault
   3. One timing change added 0.8 stars to app rating. Changed review prompt from early use to after value delivery. 3.2 stars jumped to 4.0 stars. 10 score 12 comments. Pure ASO gold. | ITERATE_EXISTING_NOW | score=128 | target=Streakr
   4. HabitSwipe app: 2500 users and $799 revenue in 2 months. 76 score 27 comments. Real app store data. Habit tracker directly in our app factory lane. | ITERATE_EXISTING_NOW | score=127 | target=Streakr
   5. Review prompt timing hack: +0.8 stars by delaying review request to value moment | ITERATE_EXISTING_NOW | score=125 | target=PrayerLock / Scripture Streak AI layer
   6. Habit tracker apps are printing: HabitSwipe $800 revenue, 2.5K users in 2 months | ITERATE_EXISTING_NOW | score=122 | target=Streakr
   7. Minimum Viable Day concept: 307 upvotes, viral productivity framework | ITERATE_EXISTING_NOW | score=122 | target=Streakr
   8. Free trial paywall framework: 7-day trial = 5x conversion lift (2% to 11%). Hard paywall k | BUILD_NEW_NOW | score=118 | target=NEW_BUILD

top_queue.title: BibleChat (Romanian 2-man studio pivot) reached $750K/mo net revenue in March 2025. 1.5M downloads that month. Tech: React Native + RAG on scripture corpus + Adapty paywalls + multiple fine-tuned LLMs. Monetization: freemium, $4.99/wk anchor, $12.99/mo, $59.99/yr, $99.99 lifetime. Soft paywall with hidden skip button + 7-day trial. Growth: character persona TikTok accounts (Sarah from Bible Chat), 500+ videos, 1 video at 60M views, then scaled winners as paid ads on TikTok/Meta/Google. Multi-language localized ads. SEO content funnel. Books & Reference category (less competition than Lifestyle). 97% free users, ~1-2% conversion rate. App Store ID 6448849666.

Pomodoro iOS app. Solo dev. $0 ad spend. 23 days to $300 MRR. 2.8K downloads. 4 tactics: (1) 20+ language localization Day 1 for non-US App Store long-tail ranking. (2) Native SwiftUI as marketing angle. (3) Human narrative story for Reddit posts not product pitch. (4) Lifetime pricing at ~1yr sub price to drive cash and anchor value.
One timing change added 0.8 stars to app rating. Changed review prompt from early use to after value delivery. 3.2 stars jumped to 4.0 stars. 10 score 12 comments. Pure ASO gold.
HabitSwipe app: 2500 users and $799 revenue in 2 months. 76 score 27 comments. Real app store data. Habit tracker directly in our app factory lane.
Review prompt timing hack: +0.8 stars by delaying review request to value moment
Habit tracker apps are printing: HabitSwipe $800 revenue, 2.5K users in 2 months
Minimum Viable Day concept: 307 upvotes, viral productivity framework
Free trial paywall framework: 7-day trial = 5x conversion lift (2% to 11%). Hard paywall k
